have h_s18_t1_generators_and_lifts: …;

assume hKernelFinite, hImageFinite;
L125442L125446

statement: ∃I, finite I ∧ ∃a : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I a;
proof term: exact (andER (left_module K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL) (∃I, finite I ∧ ∃a : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I a) hKernelFinite);

L125518

let j; assume hj;
L125521L125522

L125523
apply image elimination from hbj;
L125525L125526
let x; assume hx, hbjx;
L125527
thus thesis by witness x from hx, hbjx;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λz ⇒ z ∈ L ∧ f z = b j) x (andI (x ∈ L) (f x = b j) hx (eq_sym (b j) (f x) hbjx)));
end;
L125531
thus thesis by witness I from hFiniteI, hA, hFiniteJ, hB, hLifts;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λI0 ⇒ finite I0 ∧ ∃a0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I0 a0 ∧ ∃J0, finite J0 ∧ ∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J0 b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J0, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) I (andI (finite I) (∃a0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I a0 ∧ ∃J0, finite J0 ∧ ∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J0 b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J0, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) hFiniteI (ex_intro_setfun (λa0 ⇒ generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I a0 ∧ ∃J0, finite J0 ∧ ∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J0 b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J0, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) a (andI (generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f) addL smulL I a) (∃J0, finite J0 ∧ ∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J0 b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J0, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) hA (ex_intro (λJ0 ⇒ finite J0 ∧ ∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J0 b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J0, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) J (andI (finite J) (∃b0 : set → set, generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) hFiniteJ (ex_intro_setfun (λb0 ⇒ generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J b0 ∧ ∀j ∈ J, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b0 j) b (andI (generating_family K addK mulK (module_homomorphism_image L f) addM smulM J b) (∀j ∈ J, ∃x ∈ L, f x = b j) hB hLifts))))))));
end;
L125608
have h_s18_t1_residual_in_kernel: ∀ x, z ∈ L, …;
proof from hf (17 steps)
statement: ∀x z ∈ L, f z = f x → addL x (group_inverse L addL z) ∈ module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f;
L125614L125615
have hGroupHom: group_homomorphism L addL M addM f by module_homomorphism_additive_group_homomorphism from hf;

statement: group_homomorphism L addL M addM f;
proof term: exact (god1_module_homomorphism_additive_group_homomorphism K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f hf);
L125617L125618
have hGroupL: group L addL by group_homomorphism_domain_group from hGroupHom;
formal
statement: group L addL;
proof term: exact (god1_group_homomorphism_domain_group L addL M addM f hGroupHom);
L125619L125620
have hGroupM: group M addM by group_homomorphism_codomain_group from hGroupHom;
formal
statement: group M addM;
proof term: exact (god1_group_homomorphism_codomain_group L addL M addM f hGroupHom);
L125621L125622L125623L125624
let x; assume hx; let z; assume hz, hfzx;
L125625L125626
have hNegZ: group_inverse L addL z ∈ L by group_inverse_in from hGroupL, hz;
L125627L125628
have hResidualL: addL x (group_inverse L addL z) ∈ L by group_law_of_composition from hGroupL, hx, hNegZ;
formal
statement: addL x (group_inverse L addL z) ∈ L;
proof term: exact (god1_group_law_of_composition L addL hGroupL x hx (group_inverse L addL z) hNegZ);
L125630L125632
have hResidualZero: f… = 0M by transitivity using group_homomorphism_multiplies from hGroupHom, hx, hNegZ, hz, hfzx, hGroupM;
formal
statement: f (addL x (group_inverse L addL z)) = module_zero M addM;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (f (addL x (group_inverse L addL z))) (addM (f x) (f (group_inverse L addL z))) (module_zero M addM) (god1_group_homomorphism_multiplies L addL M addM f hGroupHom x hx (group_inverse L addL z) hNegZ) (eq_i_tra (addM (f x) (f (group_inverse L addL z))) (addM (f x) (group_inverse M addM (f z))) (module_zero M addM) (f_eq_i (λu ⇒ addM (f x) u) (f (group_inverse L addL z)) (group_inverse M addM (f z)) (god1_group_homomorphism_preserves_inverse L addL M addM f hGroupHom z hz)) (eq_i_tra (addM (f x) (group_inverse M addM (f z))) (addM (f z) (group_inverse M addM (f z))) (module_zero M addM) (f_eq_i (λu ⇒ addM u (group_inverse M addM (f z))) (f x) (f z) (eq_sym (f z) (f x) hfzx)) (andER (group_inverse M addM (f z) ∈ M ∧ addM (group_inverse M addM (f z)) (f z) = module_zero M addM) (addM (f z) (group_inverse M addM (f z)) = module_zero M addM) (god1_group_inverse_specification M addM hGroupM (f z) (god1_group_homomorphism_maps_into L addL M addM f hGroupHom z hz))))));
L125664
thus thesis by set introduction from hResidualL, hResidualZero;
formal
exact (SepI L (λy ⇒ f y = module_zero M addM) (addL x (group_inverse L addL z)) hResidualL hResidualZero);
end;
L125687
have h_s18_t1_generated_submodule_containment: ∀ X, …;
proof (28 steps)
statement: ∀X, ∀addX smulX : set → set → set, ∀N I, ∀a : set → set, ∀Q, submodule K addK mulK X addX smulX N → generating_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a → submodule K addK mulK X addX smulX Q → (∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ Q) → N ⊆ Q;
L125694L125695
let X, addX, smulX, N, I, a, Q; assume hN, hGenerating, hQ, haQ;
L125696L125697
have hX: left_module K addK mulK X addX smulX by submodule_ambient_module from hN;

statement: left_module K addK mulK X addX smulX;
proof term: exact (god1_submodule_ambient_module K addK mulK X addX smulX N hN);
L125699L125700
have haN: ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ N by hGenerating;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ N;
proof term: exact (andEL (∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ N) (submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a = N) hGenerating);
L125704L125706
have hSpanEq: submodule_generated_by_family(…, a) = N by hGenerating;
formal
statement: submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a = N;
proof term: exact (andER (∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ N) (submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a = N) hGenerating);
L125710L125711
have haX: ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ X by submodule_subset from hN, haN;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ X;
proof term: exact (λi hi ⇒ (god1_submodule_subset K addK mulK X addX smulX N hN) (a i) (haN i hi));
L125714L125716
have hInclusion: λx ⇒ x: N →lin X by submodule_inclusion_is_linear from hN;
formal
statement: module_homomorphism K addK mulK N addX smulX X addX smulX (λx ⇒ x);
proof term: exact (god1_submodule_inclusion_is_linear K addK mulK X addX smulX N hN);
L125718L125719
let x; assume hxN;
L125720L125722
have hxSpan: x ∈ submodule_generated_by_family(…, a) by mem_eq_set_subst from hSpanEq, hxN;
formal
statement: x ∈ submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_set_subst N (submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a) x (eq_sym (submodule_generated_by_family K addK mulK N addX smulX I a) N hSpanEq) hxN);
L125727L125729
have hxCombinationN: linear_combination(…, x) by hxSpan;
formal
statement: linear_combination K addK mulK N addX smulX I a x;
proof term: exact (SepE2 N (λy ⇒ linear_combination K addK mulK N addX smulX I a y) x hxSpan);
L125732L125734
have hCoeffExists: ∃ coeff: set → set, linear_representation(…, coeff) by hxCombinationN;
formal
statement: ∃coeff : set → set, linear_representation K addK mulK N addX smulX I a x coeff;
proof term: exact (andER (x ∈ N ∧ ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ N) (∃coeff : set → set, linear_representation K addK mulK N addX smulX I a x coeff) hxCombinationN);
L125739
apply hCoeffExists;
L125740L125741
let coeff; assume hRepN;
L125742L125744
have hRepX: linear_representation(…, coeff) by module_homomorphism_maps_linear_representation from hInclusion, haN, hRepN;
formal
statement: linear_representation K addK mulK X addX smulX I a x coeff;
proof term: exact (god1_module_homomorphism_maps_linear_representation K addK mulK N addX smulX X addX smulX (λy ⇒ y) I a x coeff hInclusion haN hRepN);
L125760
thus thesis by linear_combination_in_submodule from hX, hQ, haQ, hN, hxN, haX, hRepX;
formal
exact (god1_linear_combination_in_submodule K addK mulK X addX smulX I a x Q hX hQ haQ hxCombinationX);

hxCombinationX: linear_combination(…, x) by hN, hxN, haX, hRepX (conjunction assembly);
end;

have hCSpec: ∀ j ∈ J, …;
proof from hLifts (3 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ J, god1_s18_chosen_lift L f b j ∈ L ∧ f (god1_s18_chosen_lift L f b j) = b j;

let j; assume hj;
L125897
thus thesis by Eps_i_ex from hLifts, hj;

exact (Eps_i_ex (λx ⇒ x ∈ L ∧ f x = b j) (hLifts j hj));

statement: ∀j ∈ J, god1_s18_chosen_lift L f b j ∈ L;
proof term: exact (λj hj ⇒ andEL (god1_s18_chosen_lift L f b j ∈ L) (f (god1_s18_chosen_lift L f b j) = b j) (hCSpec j hj));

L125911L125914
have hKernelSubmodule: ker(f) ≤ L by module_homomorphism_kernel_submodule from hf;

statement: submodule K addK mulK L addL smulL (module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f);
proof term: exact (god1_module_homomorphism_kernel_submodule K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f hf);
L125916L125918
have hImageSubmodule: im(f) ≤ M by module_homomorphism_image_submodule from hf, hL;
formal
statement: submodule K addK mulK M addM smulM (module_homomorphism_image L f);
proof term: exact (god1_module_homomorphism_image_submodule K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f hf L (god1_module_is_submodule_of_itself K addK mulK L addL smulL hL));
L125922L125925
have hAMapsKernel: ∀ i ∈ I, a i ∈ ker(f) by hA;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ I, a i ∈ module_homomorphism_kernel K addK mulK L addL smulL M addM smulM f;

have hInj0Bij: bij p {Inj0 i|i ∈ p} Inj0 by bijectivity;
formal
statement: bij p {Inj0 i|i ∈ p} Inj0;
proof term: exact (bijI p {Inj0 i|i ∈ p} Inj0 (λi hi ⇒ ReplI p Inj0 i hi) (λi hi k hk heq ⇒ Inj0_inj i k heq) (λy hy ⇒ ReplE_impred p Inj0 y hy (∃i ∈ p, Inj0 i = y) (λi hi hyi ⇒ ex_intro (λk ⇒ k ∈ p ∧ Inj0 k = y) i (andI (i ∈ p) (Inj0 i = y) hi (eq_sym y (Inj0 i) hyi)))));
L128405L128406
have hInj1Bij: bij q {Inj1 j|j ∈ q} Inj1 by bijectivity;
formal
statement: bij q {Inj1 j|j ∈ q} Inj1;
proof term: exact (bijI q {Inj1 j|j ∈ q} Inj1 (λj hj ⇒ ReplI q Inj1 j hj) (λj hj k hk heq ⇒ Inj1_inj j k heq) (λy hy ⇒ ReplE_impred q Inj1 y hy (∃j ∈ q, Inj1 j = y) (λj hj hyj ⇒ ex_intro (λk ⇒ k ∈ q ∧ Inj1 k = y) j (andI (j ∈ q) (Inj1 j = y) hj (eq_sym y (Inj1 j) hyj)))));
